summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Discord RP Game Master bot major refactoring. All new Player Character and Allowed Player features working correctly. Message-driven GM with German output functional. All existing pages and APIs preserved.
passed_tests: POST /api/player-characters creates PC with all 20+ fields
POST /api/gm/message-driven accepts player message and returns German response
Frontend: Characters page loads with create/edit dialog
Frontend: New Character button opens tabbed form with 4 tabs (Basics, Personality, World, GM Only)
Frontend: Character creation end-to-end workflow functional
Frontend: All existing pages work (Campaigns, NPCs, Lore, Rules, Channels, EventLog)
Frontend: Sidebar shows Characters nav item
Frontend: No UI errors or broken functionality
Integration: LLM message-driven GM responds in German
All existing campaign/NPC/lore/rules/channel APIs still functional
